current_behavior: Frontend stale cached assets could be served, causing old UI/runtime paths and API mismatch behavior.
expected_behavior: Frontend should always serve the current deployed build for HTML/JS/CSS in this environment.
root_cause: No explicit no-cache policy for critical frontend assets in gateway configuration.
impact: Users saw frontend loaded but API workflows not functioning consistently.
reproduction: Load app after deployment where browser keeps old cache; Observe UI/version mismatch and broken auth/API behavior.
verification: Cache-Control no-store on / and /js/*.js; Gateway serves new auth code; Login/API via :8080 succeeds.
fix_summary: Added no-store/no-cache headers for html/js/css and rebuilt gateway image.

current_behavior: JWT secret was weak placeholder value (change-me-please) in active runtime.
expected_behavior: JWT secret must be strong/unpredictable in runtime.
root_cause: Default/placeholder secret not rotated in active environment.
reproduction: Run docker compose config and inspect JWT_SECRET.
verification: JWT_SECRET rotated to random 48-char value and API restarted with successful login.
fix_summary: Replaced JWT_SECRET in .env and restarted API container.

current_behavior: README did not fully reflect auth/register/admin notification websocket flows.
expected_behavior: Operational docs should match deployed behavior and endpoints.
impact: Operational confusion and incorrect run/debug procedures.
reproduction: Compare README flow vs current routes/endpoints and UI.
verification: README updated with current architecture endpoints and runtime flow.

current_behavior: Admin default credentials remain admin/admin by configuration in active environment.
expected_behavior: Production credentials should be unique and rotated.
root_cause: Business requirement requests fixed admin/admin seed for administrative access.
impact: Credential stuffing and unauthorized admin access risk if exposed.
reproduction: Attempt login with admin/admin on current runtime.
verification: Risk confirmed via runtime config and successful login test.
fix_summary: Not changed due explicit requirement; mitigation is overriding ADMIN_PASSWORD per environment.
